title: Non-record: Custom tokenizer with web-content symbols + pre-tokenized dataset
author: mikeapedia

data.description: Custom SentencePiece BPE tokenizer trained for web-crawled text with split_digits=false and user-defined symbols for common URL/TLD patterns
Corpus frequency analysis on 100K FineWeb documents to select high-frequency web patterns for tokenizer symbols
Pre-tokenized FineWeb binary shards uploaded for training use

novel_contributions: Custom SentencePiece BPE tokenizer optimized for web-content patterns
Keeping digit sequences intact with split_digits=false
Using frequency analysis to choose high-value URL/TLD user-defined symbols
Providing pre-tokenized binary shards on HuggingFace for direct training
Demonstrating that train_gpt.py can use custom tokenizers without code changes
